_notes: v1.1.0 (Phase DF): added optional preferred_reasoning_level per artifact type. HarnessRouter reads it as a soft hint per stage — backends that support reasoning-effort knobs (OpenAI Responses reasoning.effort, Anthropic thinking budgets, Gemini thinking-token budgets) honor it; others ignore. Gearshift per-session overrides always win. Seed values from OpenAI's delightful-frontends field guide: webSPA/miniApp default to medium (the post found low/medium reasoning often produces stronger frontend results); microservice/Unity stay high for correctness-heavy work; autofix stages bump to high across the board because the generator already took a pass.

miniApp.steering_hint: Output the COMPLETE mini-app in a ```miniapp JSON block with id, name, manifest, and html.
miniApp.description: Single-page HTML/JS/CSS app rendered in a webview. Default for games, tools, interactive UI.

macOSApp.steering_hint: Output the COMPLETE app in a ```macosapp JSON block with id, name, template, and files.
macOSApp.description: Native Swift macOS app (Package.swift project, compiled locally via mChatAIShell playground).

unityGame.steering_hint: Output the COMPLETE Unity game in a ```unitygame JSON block with id, name, genre (arcade/platformer/topDown/puzzle/card/shooter), unityVersion, and files (Assets/Scripts/SceneSetup.cs plus gameplay scripts). Include a SceneSetup.cs bootstrapper that creates all scene objects from code (no .unity file). No prefab dependencies.
unityGame.description: Unity 6 LTS C# game project. No on-our-side compile — user opens files in Unity Hub.

pythonMicroservice.steering_hint: Output the COMPLETE Python microservice in a ```pythonservice JSON block with id, name, framework (fastapi/flask/django), pythonVersion, and files. Include a main.py entry point, requirements.txt with pinned versions, and a Dockerfile. No cloud-specific config — the service should run locally with `pip install -r requirements.txt && python main.py`.
pythonMicroservice.description: Python web microservice (FastAPI/Flask/Django). Delivered as files dict; user runs locally or deploys via their own Docker/Cloud Run pipeline.

reactNativeApp.steering_hint: Output the COMPLETE React Native app in a ```reactnative JSON block with id, name, expoVersion, and files (App.js, package.json, app.json). Self-contained — should run via `npx expo start`.
reactNativeApp.description: React Native / Expo mobile app. Cross-platform iOS + Android.

electronApp.steering_hint: Output the COMPLETE Electron app in a ```electronapp JSON block with id, name, electronVersion, and files (main.js, renderer.html, package.json). Should run via `npm install && npm start`.

androidApp.steering_hint: Output the COMPLETE Android app in a ```androidapp JSON block with id, name, minSdk, targetSdk, language (kotlin), and files (MainActivity.kt, build.gradle, AndroidManifest.xml). Should build via `./gradlew assembleDebug`.
androidApp.description: Native Android app (Kotlin + Jetpack Compose). Built locally via gradle.

webSPA.steering_hint: Output the COMPLETE web SPA in a ```webspa JSON block with id, name, framework (react/vue/svelte), and files (index.html, main.js, package.json). Should build via `npm install && npm run build`.
webSPA.description: Web single-page application (React/Vue/Svelte). More structured than a miniApp — multi-file build pipeline.
